title: galium hypotrichium subsp. subalpinum
intro: Galium hypotrichium subsp. subalpinum, also known as Alpine Bedstraw, is a subspecies of perennial herb that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Alpine Bedstraw has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. It can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
